Notes: Migrated from the legacy TSV rendering manifests.

Target.Reason: MuPDF is the accepted target for this huge-page rendering case; pdfe also matches Ghostscript while Poppler renders an incompatible striped pattern.

1.QualityReason: Focused review shows pdfe matches the MuPDF/Ghostscript solid-red page semantics; residual difference against MuPDF is negligible antialias/noise.
1.Notes: Reviewed at fallback/lower DPI against current pdfe, MuPDF, Cairo, and Ghostscript renders on 2026-07-03.
